Class SecuritycurrencyPosition<T extends Securitycurrency<T>>

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.reportviews.securitycurrency.SecuritycurrencyPosition<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
ISecurityDataProviderUrls
public class SecuritycurrencyPosition<T extends Securitycurrency<T>> extends Object implements ISecurityDataProviderUrls

  • Method Details

    • getIntradayUrl

      public String getIntradayUrl()
      Description copied from interface: ISecurityDataProviderUrls
      Gets the URL for intraday price data from the configured data provider.
      Specified by:
      getIntradayUrl in interface ISecurityDataProviderUrls
      Returns:
      the intraday data URL, or null if no intraday connector is configured

    • setIntradayUrl

      public void setIntradayUrl(String intradayUrl)
      Description copied from interface: ISecurityDataProviderUrls
      Sets the URL for intraday price data.
      Specified by:
      setIntradayUrl in interface ISecurityDataProviderUrls
      Parameters:
      intradayUrl - the intraday data URL

    • getHistoricalUrl

      public String getHistoricalUrl()
      Description copied from interface: ISecurityDataProviderUrls
      Gets the URL for historical price data from the configured data provider.
      Specified by:
      getHistoricalUrl in interface ISecurityDataProviderUrls
      Returns:
      the historical data URL, or null if no historical connector is configured

    • setHistoricalUrl

      public void setHistoricalUrl(String historicalUrl)
      Description copied from interface: ISecurityDataProviderUrls
      Sets the URL for historical price data.
      Specified by:
      setHistoricalUrl in interface ISecurityDataProviderUrls
      Parameters:
      historicalUrl - the historical data URL

    • getDividendUrl

      public String getDividendUrl()
      Description copied from interface: ISecurityDataProviderUrls
      Gets the URL for dividend data from the configured data provider. Only applicable to securities, not currency pairs.
      Specified by:
      getDividendUrl in interface ISecurityDataProviderUrls
      Returns:
      the dividend data URL, or null if no dividend connector is configured

    • setDividendUrl

      public void setDividendUrl(String dividendUrl)
      Description copied from interface: ISecurityDataProviderUrls
      Sets the URL for dividend data.
      Specified by:
      setDividendUrl in interface ISecurityDataProviderUrls
      Parameters:
      dividendUrl - the dividend data URL

    • getSplitUrl

      public String getSplitUrl()
      Description copied from interface: ISecurityDataProviderUrls
      Gets the URL for stock split data from the configured data provider. Only applicable to securities, not currency pairs.
      Specified by:
      getSplitUrl in interface ISecurityDataProviderUrls
      Returns:
      the split data URL, or null if no split connector is configured

    • setSplitUrl

      public void setSplitUrl(String splitUrl)
      Description copied from interface: ISecurityDataProviderUrls
      Sets the URL for stock split data.
      Specified by:
      setSplitUrl in interface ISecurityDataProviderUrls
      Parameters:
      splitUrl - the split data URL
